data.title: Reclamation Partners and Fox Capital Partners acquire 74,300 sq ft light-industrial building in Avon, MA near Boston.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Reclamation Partners, in collaboration with Fox Capital Partners, revealed the purchase of a 74,300-square foot light-industrial facility at 660 Bodwell Street, Avon, MA. This property is situated in Boston's Route-128 infill zone.

data.title: FSA Store® and HSA Store® highlight top 25 health products for 2025, in preparation for March 15 grace period.
data.description: The parent company of Health-E Commerce®, which includes FSA Store® and HSA Store®, is helping customers kickstart their New Year's health resolutions by releasing a list of the most popular products for 2025. This comes just in time for the March 15 grace period deadline. The announcement was made on January 15, 2026, in Dallas, marking the end of the second week of the year.

data.title: Mattamy Homes acquires 3 properties in Tampa Bay including Sun Bay, Amara Bay, and Skyhawk residences.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on January 15, 2026, Mattamy Homes, the biggest family-owned homebuilder in North America, completed the purchase of three new properties in the Tampa Bay area. These properties include Sun Bay Townes in Tampa, Amara Bay Residences & Marina in St. Petersburg, and Skyhawk in Lithia.

data.title: CME Group plans to introduce futures for Cardano, Chainlink, and Stellar, expanding beyond Bitcoin, Ether, XRP, and Solana.
data.description: CME is looking to broaden its range of regulated cryptocurrency derivative contracts by introducing listings for new alternative coins. This move will extend their offerings beyond the current four options of Bitcoin, Ether, XRP, and Solana.
Israel's Prime Minister Netanyahu asked Trump on Wednesday to delay an attack on Iran - NYT.

data.title: bubba announces new brand identity & water bottle designs on 14-Jan-2026. Personalized hydration for all.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, BUBBA® introduced a fresh brand identity and innovative water bottle designs, transforming daily hydration into a form of personal expression. The revamped identity signifies a significant step forward for the company, showcasing their commitment to providing a unique and dynamic hydration experience. The new designs incorporate cutting-edge features and a modern aesthetic, catering to the evolving needs of consumers. Through this rebranding initiative, BUBBA® aims to enhance customer engagement and solidify its position as a leader in the hydration industry.

data.title: XRP price at $2.13, $150M deal with LMAX Group, $1.26B ETF inflows may push XRP towards $3 breakout.
data.description: XRP is currently being tested at $2.13 after facing four consecutive rejections at a crucial resistance line. Despite these obstacles, Ripple has clinched a significant $150 million deal with LMAX Group, along with welcoming a staggering $1.26 billion in ETF inflows. These positive developments are paving the way for a potential surge towards $3. The resistance trendline has proven to be a tough barrier for XRP, as attempts to surpass it in July, August, September, October, and January have all been met with strong selling pressure. The cryptocurrency is now at a critical juncture, with the possibility of breaking out to reach the $3 mark.

data.title: Wall Street surges with Nasdaq 100 up 1.2%, S&P 500 climbed nearly 1%, AMD & ASML up 6%, TSMC blockbuster results.
data.description: U.S. stocks surged on Thursday towards record levels, driven by robust earnings reports and growing optimism in the AI sector. The Nasdaq 100 rose by 1.2%, aiming to recover all losses from the previous day, while the S&P 500 saw a nearly 1% increase. The rally was spearheaded by semiconductor stocks following exceptional quarterly performances from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (NYSE: TSM), sparking enthusiasm throughout the AI supply chain. Notable gains were seen in Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ: AMD) and ASML Holding N.V. (NASDAQ: ASML) which both climbed around 6%, propelled by TSMC's positive capital spending forecast. The upbeat trend extended to chip equipment companies, with KLA Corp. (NASDAQ: KLAC) surging 9% and Applied Materials Inc. (NASDAQ: AMAT) rising approximately 8%. In the financial sector, confidence was boosted by impressive earnings announcements from Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (NYSE: GS) and Morgan Stanley.

data.title: Global managed services market set to reach $1.02 trillion by 2035, with IT infrastructure services leading, and network services growing rapidly.
data.description: A report on the managed services market has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market is projected to experience significant growth, with its value expected to increase from USD 323.8 billion to USD 1.02 trillion by 2035. This growth signifies a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.1% during this period. The report analyzes the market distribution by type of service, deployment, enterprise, vertical, and geographical regions.

data.title: Capital Engine partners with Regiment to enhance private markets infrastructure and co-syndication. Aiming to enable co-syndication of select private opportunities.
data.description: A global FinTech and investment bank, Capital Engine®, has recently partnered with Regiment Securities, LLC, a FINRA-registered financial services firm. This collaboration aims to enhance private-market distribution and co-syndication capabilities, as well as marketplace connectivity. The goal is to facilitate the co-syndication of particular private investment opportunities. Capital Engine® focuses on building crucial infrastructure for the private markets estimated at $65 trillion. This alliance seeks to leverage Regiment's expertise to expand these capabilities.

data.title: Inflation remains stable with CPI rising 2.7% YoY in Dec, core CPI up 2.6%, food prices surged 20% in one month.
data.description: In December, the Consumer Price Index (CPI) rose by 2.7% year over year, with prices increasing by 0.3% month over month. Core CPI, which excludes food and energy, rose by 2.6% year over year and 0.2% over the month. Housing, food, and utilities costs continued to rise significantly, putting pressure on household budgets. The Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that the inflation rate remained stable, in line with expectations. However, certain categories such as subscription and rental of video games saw a significant increase of nearly 20% in a single month. Overall, while most inflation categories saw modest changes, some household expenses continued to rise at a faster rate.

data.title: FLOKI price predicted to reach $0.000280 by Feb 2026. Currently at $0.000052, with analysts forecasting 440% upside potential in 4 weeks despite mixed signals.
data.description: The cryptocurrency FLOKI is currently priced at $0.000052 and is displaying conflicting indicators, with a neutral RSI at 55.52 and a bearish MACD momentum. Analysts have set a target of $0.000280 within the next 4 weeks, indicating a potential 440% increase from the current levels. Despite the technical uncertainties at present, there is optimism for a significant upside in the near future for FLOKI investors.

data.title: FDA files Rejoni's Juveena® Hydrogel System PMA for preventing intrauterine adhesions in uterine health; formal filing review completed.
data.description: A company in Bedford, Massachusetts, Rejoni, Inc., specializing in uterine health, has disclosed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has wrapped up the review process and submitted the Premarket Approval (PMA) application for the Juveena Hydrogel System. The FDA confirmed that the submission meets the criteria for further examination. The Juveena Hydrogel System serves as a transient spacer to assist in averting complications.

data.title: Central bankers worldwide support Fed Chair Powell amid DOJ investigation, warn against political interference. European Central Bank President Lagarde and 12 others back Powell in rare joint statement. Other signatories include governors from Bank of England, Riksbank, Swiss National Bank, Bank of Canada, and Reserve Bank of Australia.
data.description: Prominent central bankers worldwide, including European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde and Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey, have strongly backed Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell amidst a Justice Department investigation into his congressional testimony. A coalition of twelve influential central banks issued a rare joint statement expressing unwavering support for Powell, emphasizing the importance of monetary independence and condemning political meddling in monetary policy. The signatories, which included officials from Sweden, Switzerland, Canada, Australia, and South Korea, emphasized that any interference poses a threat to both U.S. credibility and global financial stability. This united front underscores the significant backing Powell has garnered amid increasing scrutiny.

data.title: STAAR Surgical shares fall as Broadwood gains board influence; Broadwood, holding 31% stock, aims to boost profitability. CEO to stay until 2026.
data.description: Shares of STAAR Surgical Company (NASDAQ: STAA) are experiencing a dip due to significant board changes. Broadwood Partners, including Neal Bradsher, Richard LeBuhn, and Christopher Wang, has joined the Board of Directors following a cooperation deal. This shift also marks Chair Elizabeth Yeu and CEO Stephen Farrell stepping down, the latter staying until January 31, 2026. The restructuring aims to boost profitability and long-term value creation, according to STAAR director Louis Silverman. Broadwood, possessing 31% of STAA's common stock, is dedicated to assisting the company in achieving its full potential. The company earlier noted a deficit in necessary stockholder votes in January.

data.title: JPMorgan creates new Quant unit to compete in electronic trading, led by Chi Nzelu.aims to strengthen data-driven trading.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is boosting its defenses against electronic trading competitors by establishing a quantitative trading and research group. The new group aims to enhance data-driven and automated trading abilities. Chi Nzelu, the former global head of fixed income, currency, and commodities electronic trading, will lead this initiative. The move was reported by Bloomberg based on an internal memo. This strategic decision reflects JPMorgan's intent to maintain an edge in electronic trading.

data.title: Denver Mattress and The Salvation Army celebrate successful 2025 holiday campaign "Together Doing Even More Good".
data.description: In Denver on January 15, 2026, Denver Mattress Company and The Salvation Army Intermountain Division marked a successful year for their "Together Doing Even More Good" holiday campaign. Running from Thanksgiving to Christmas in 2025, the campaign achieved remarkable results.
